prompt: Create a photorealistic wide-angle smartphone selfie in a millennium gyaru / Japanese-Korean cute street fashion aesthetic. A young woman, anonymous gyaru girl, stands on a city sidewalk in front of a pink cafe storefront, holding the camera close with her left hand making a large peace sign in the extreme foreground. Her face is intentionally covered by a plain opaque square privacy censor in muted brown. She has long wavy dark brown hair with subtle highlights, glossy layered styling, a tiny heart hair clip, and a soft glamorous look. Outfit: white cropped lace-trim camisole with a pink rhinestone butterfly on the chest, layered silver necklaces with heart and cross pendants, many silver rings, sparkly rhinestone nail art, a pink plaid mini skirt with a white belt and chain, a leopard-print cardigan, and a pink shoulder bag. Background: urban side street with paving stones, road markings, buildings, and a cute pink cafe entrance with glass doors; visible storefront text includes exactly six background text elements: “CAFE”, “cup cake”, “coffee”, “B1”, “MEGA COFFEE”, and a pink neon-style sign reading “love / Open / Cake / Coffee”. Add bright sticker decorations in the upper-right and right side: exactly three main sticker text groups, 1 large glossy hot-pink bubble sticker reading Cute 야호~! with silver glitter outline and three heart icons, 1 smaller sticker reading やっほ〜♡, and 1 smaller sticker reading やっほ〜♡. Add tiny sparkle effects and small pink heart doodles around the stickers. Use casual flash-free daylight, slight lens distortion from the close phone camera, shallow perspective, high-detail skin, jewelry, nails, and fabric textures, playful overdecorated 2000s purikura energy, pink and silver color palette, realistic photo base with cute digital sticker overlays.
